heading: State HIV testing programs established prior to or afterMay 20, 1996
label: 300ff–37 State HIV testing programs established prior to or afterMay 20, 1996
text: Nothing in this subpart shall be construed to disqualify a State from receiving grants under this subchapter if such State has established at any time prior to or after , a program of mandatory HIV testing.May 20, 1996
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2627 of act , was classified to prior to repeal by .July 1, 1944section 300ff–35 of this titlePub. L. 106–345
